name: New Scraper

**Country:** [e.g., Ghana]
**Source type:** [e.g., Parliament, Judiciary, Gazette, Electoral Commission]
**Source URL:** [URL of the government website]

**Data available:**
- [ ] Names
- [ ] Titles/Positions
- [ ] Dates (appointment/term)
- [ ] Institutional affiliation
- [ ] Other: ...

**Notes**
Any additional context about the data source, language, or access requirements.
